productDisplayName: Carlton London Men's Semi Formal Black Shoe
description: Perfect for those semi-formal occasions, this pair of leather shoes from carlton london is designed for the man who loves to experiment. Upper Leather upper with fish scale grooved tongue and side panels for enhanced durability and style Reinforced heel panel for enhanced durability Laces-ups for snug Fit Stitch detailing for style Midsole TPU midsole for durability and comfort Mildly cushioned footbed for protection Outsole TPU outsole for enhanced durability and comfort Decoupled raised heel with back panel made of durable rubber for grip and support shoe careWipe surface using a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
